projects.name: Wealth Creators
projects.description: A school project that simulates a shop where users can purchase items and place bids on high-value products.

projects.name: TastyBites
projects.description: A personal project that allows users to create and share recipes.

projects.name: Bubble
projects.description: A school project that simulates the Spotify application, allowing users to listen to music, watch short videos, read news articles, and create their own playlists.
